description: Triggered when the user wants to set up a tracking plan, implement GA4 events, track CTAs/forms/scroll, configure UTM parameters, or create analytics dashboards for marketing decisions.
should_trigger: Set up GA4 event tracking for our landing page
I need to track form abandonment and field-level errors
Create a scroll depth tracking hook for Next.js
How do I preserve UTM parameters through a multi-step funnel?
Set up CTA visibility and click tracking with IntersectionObserver
Create a complete tracking plan for our SaaS landing page
Define custom dimensions and conversion goals in GA4 for our B2B funnel
should_not_trigger: Install Plausible analytics in my Next.js app
How do I design a statistically valid A/B test?
What is the best analytics provider for GDPR compliance?
How do I build a cookie consent banner?
